stars.description: DeepSeek 4 Flash local inference engine for Metal
stars.highlights: ds4 is a local inference engine for DeepSeek 4 Flash, optimized for Apple Metal. It provides efficient on-device inference for a cutting-edge LLM, making advanced AI accessible on consumer hardware.
stars.worthReading: It demonstrates how to run a state-of-the-art model locally, which is crucial for privacy and offline use cases. The project is by antirez, a respected developer, and is gaining traction quickly.
stars.scoreReason: Freshness is high (new repo, 784 stars, rising), relevance is high (LLM inference engine), and concreteness is solid (working code for Metal).

stars.highlights: Tattletale is a stealth LLM inference engine written in Nim, focusing on performance and efficiency. It aims to provide a lightweight alternative for running large language models with minimal overhead.
stars.worthReading: It's worth exploring for its novel approach to LLM inference using Nim, which could offer unique performance characteristics and a fresh perspective in a field dominated by Python and C++.
stars.scoreReason: Freshness is moderate (low stars but rising, early stage), relevance is high (LLM inference engine), concreteness is low (stealth, no detailed features yet).

stars.highlights: This repository provides efficient tools for computing eigenvalues and eigenvectors of the Hessian matrix in PyTorch, enabling deeper understanding of neural network loss landscapes. It implements power iteration and Lanczos methods for scalable eigendecomposition, useful for optimization analysis and generalization studies.
stars.worthReading: Understanding Hessian properties is crucial for advanced optimization and generalization research; this library makes such analysis accessible and efficient for PyTorch users.
stars.scoreReason: Freshness is low (428 stars, no recent updates), relevance is moderate (touches optimization but not frontier AI), concreteness is high (working code with clear methodology).

stars.description: HRM-Text is a 1B text generation model based on the HRM architecture, strengthened by task completion and latent space reasoning.
stars.highlights: HRM-Text is a 1B parameter text generation model that introduces hierarchical reasoning and latent space reasoning to improve task completion. It offers a novel architecture that could enhance reasoning capabilities in LLMs.
stars.worthReading: This repo presents a fresh approach to reasoning in language models, which is a frontier topic. It's worth exploring for those interested in advancing beyond standard transformer architectures.
stars.scoreReason: Freshness is moderate (436 stars, new architecture but not yet widely adopted), relevance is high (LLM reasoning), and concreteness is solid (specific model and code available).

stars.description: auth and other api helpers for mummy
stars.highlights: Sarcophagus provides authentication and API helper utilities for the Mummy web framework in Nim. It simplifies common backend tasks like user auth, session management, and request handling.
stars.worthReading: For Nim developers building web applications with Mummy, this library offers ready-to-use auth and API helpers that can accelerate development.
stars.scoreReason: Low freshness (18 stars, niche language), moderate relevance (web infra but not frontier AI), and concrete but very specific utility (Nim web helpers).

stars.description: Open Source Robotic Arm for All Developers
stars.highlights: reBot-DevArm is an open-source robotic arm designed for developers, offering a platform for experimentation and learning in robotics. It provides hardware schematics, firmware, and software tools to enable custom control and integration with AI systems.
stars.worthReading: This repo bridges the gap between software and hardware, making it a valuable resource for AI developers interested in embodied AI and robotics applications.
stars.scoreReason: Freshness is moderate (3.5k stars, not extremely new but gaining traction), relevance is high (embodied AI frontier), and concreteness is strong (working hardware/software artifact).

stars.description: Mobile companion for Google's Antigravity IDE. Mirror AI sessions on your phone, send messages, stop generation, automate via 9 MCP tools or OpenAPI.

A technical exploration comparing standard deep RL (PPO) against biologically plausible learning rules on a custom Pong environment. Everything is implemented from scratch with no Stable-Baselines, no Gymnasium, no pre-built algorithms.
React components for real-time telemetry dashboards — robotics, aerospace, autonomous vehicles, industrial IoT. PFD, HSI, time-series, gauges, GPS maps, and ROS2/MQTT adapters at 60fps.
